signals.visible_form: Saturated blue shifting into pale blue and white.
signals.perceptual_read: Calm digital space; ambient rather than urgent.
signals.use_in_brand3: Use when a surface lowers technical pressure through atmospheric color.

signals.visible_form: Large blurred orb or portal shape, often cropped.
signals.perceptual_read: World entry, softness, repeated ritual, gentle motion.
signals.use_in_brand3: Use when a brand creates coherence through a recurring spatial object.

signals.visible_form: Elegant white or blue serif wordmark and headline treatment.
signals.perceptual_read: Editorial warmth and adult composure inside a Web3/game context.
signals.use_in_brand3: Use when type translates a technical category into emotional legibility.

signals.visible_form: Small condensed uppercase phrase above the large serif hero line.
signals.perceptual_read: Ceremonial caption; sets a quiet premise before the main phrase expands.
signals.use_in_brand3: Use when hierarchy is staged through scale contrast and caption-like framing.

signals.visible_form: Soft outdoor imagery with grass, flowers, dappled light, and shallow focus.
signals.use_in_brand3: Use when a digital brand borrows organic texture to regulate emotional temperature.

signals.visible_form: Printed type samples placed among flowers and grass.
signals.perceptual_read: Design process made tender; typography treated like an object in a world.
signals.use_in_brand3: Use when a brand makes its system visible as a tactile artifact.

signals.visible_form: Charms wordmark embroidered on a blue cap.
signals.perceptual_read: The soft identity can survive contact with casual merchandise.
signals.use_in_brand3: Use when evaluating whether a delicate mark remains legible outside flat digital surfaces.

signals.visible_form: A long scroll of large visual panels after the introductory copy.
signals.perceptual_read: Lookbook tempo; the brand is learned by immersion.
signals.use_in_brand3: Use when a surface teaches through repeated visual contact rather than explanation.

signals.visible_form: Short final phrase with three compact verbs or states.
signals.perceptual_read: A ritual-like exit line; simple, mnemonic, and emotional.
signals.use_in_brand3: Use when the page resolves into feeling rather than specification.

signals.signal: black site chrome with neon green accent
signals.visible_form: FLOC* page shell uses black UI chrome and neon green selection/scroll accents.
signals.perceptual_read: The case is housed inside a sharper studio frame, making the Charms surface feel even softer by contrast.
signals.use_in_brand3: Use when distinguishing project identity signals from portfolio-shell signals.
